policy_details.professional_services_covered: Provision of licensed financial planning and advisory services to retail and wholesale clients, including but not limited to: retirement planning, superannuation and SMSF advice, personal risk insurance advice (life, TPD, trauma and income protection), investment strategy and portfolio construction, budgeting and cashflow management, debt reduction strategies, and general wealth management consulting. Services also include preparation of Statements of Advice (SOAs) and Records of Advice (ROAs), periodic portfolio reviews, implementation of agreed strategies with product providers, and ongoing monitoring and reporting obligations under the Corporations Act and ASIC Regulatory Guides. The practice does not provide tax agent services (beyond general tax implications of financial products) or legal advice and refers clients to external accountants and solicitors for those matters.
policy_details.details_of_changes_to_professional_servi: From 1 March 2025, the firm expanded its services to include limited-scope Self-Managed Superannuation Fund (SMSF) strategic advice for existing clients only. This advice is restricted to investment strategy, contribution strategies, and pension commencement within SMSFs and expressly excludes SMSF establishment, compliance administration, audit services, or preparation of tax returns. All SMSF compliance and audit work is outsourced to a specialist SMSF administration provider under a written services agreement. Internal procedures and template Statements of Advice were updated in February 2025 to reflect this change, and all advisers completed additional CPD training on SMSF advice obligations prior to commencement.
